long_description:
The acadia-snapshot-copy-controller is in crashloopbackoff indal12.
Jira : https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/ACADIACP-82

Dev  team has identifie that here is a bug and as a mitigation the snapshot needs to patched 


----
There are three copies of the source snapshot. One of the copies (in us-east) was deleted, which triggered the copyActionCanceled workflow. As part of this workflow, we clean up the deleted snapshot and remove its copy reference from the source snapshot. However, for some reason that reference isn’t being removed (we’re still investigating why).
In the Snapshot CRD, all three snapshot entries still appear, but in the memory it is only shows two. This mismatch causes the pod to panic.
The immediate workaround is to manually remove the deleted snapshot’s reference from the source snapshot. 
----
Incident source: https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/C031RQMGWSU/p1764781916152889 - Arun Gopinathan
